scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,ui -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.stack: npm run build -w frontend && concurrently -k -n bundle,api -c green,blue "npm run build:watch -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
